commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: check recovery-small/26b
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: check recovery-small/26b

Revert "LU-11509 ldlm: fix lfru priv_ratio_limit overflow issue"
This reverts commit f1e4a9fcfec3f8c12720f8aca6d162e9def29c65.
Revert "LU-11509 ldlm: replace client lock LRU with LFRU"
This reverts commit 0373d0c40b2fe4fbad7377897d2203a7bb8ee953.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly env=ONLY=0-26 testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2 testlist=recovery-small
